name: Baked Steak and Lima Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lima beans; add 6 cups of water and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and let stand, covered, for 1 hour. Do not drain.
4. Cover again and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
5. In a Dutch oven, cook the bacon until crisp. Drain and reserve drippings.
6. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
7. Coat the beef with flour.
8. Brown the beef in hot drippings, pouring off excess fat.
9. Stir in the lima beans and onion.
10. Combine tomato juice, brown sugar, salt, pepper, and mustard in a bowl.
11. Pour the mixture over the beans and beef.
12. Cover and bake at 325°F for about 1½ to 2 hours until tender.
13. Serve hot topped with crumbled bacon and grated cheese to taste.
